scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the Van Gogh Museum. Would you like an audio guide?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 반 고흐 미술관에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 오디오 가이드 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, do you have one in Korean?
Which floor has 'Sunflowers' and 'The Bedroom'?
I don't care about Van Gogh.
Art museums are boring.

scenes.npcDialog: Photography is not allowed inside. Please keep your voice down.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 내부 사진 촬영은 금지되어 있어요. 조용히 해주세요.

choices.text: I understand. How long is the tour?
Of course. Where was Anne's room?
I want to take pictures.
Why can't I use my phone?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome aboard! The canal cruise is about one hour.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 승선을 환영합니다! 운하 크루즈는 약 1시간이에요.

choices.text: Great! Is there commentary in English?
Can we sit outside on the upper deck?
One hour is too long.
I don't like boats.

scenes.npcDialog: Biking is the best way to see Amsterdam! Which size do you need?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 자전거가 암스테르담 구경하는 최고의 방법이에요! 어떤 사이즈 필요하세요?

choices.text: Medium, please. Do you have a bike lane map?
Is there a helmet? I'm not used to cycling in traffic.
Biking is dangerous.
I'll just walk.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Zaanse Schans! Would you like to see inside a working windmill?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 잔세스칸스에 오신 것을 환영해요! 작동하는 풍차 내부를 보시겠어요?

choices.text: Yes! How do they work?
That sounds fascinating! Is it included in the ticket?
Windmills are boring.
I've seen enough windmills in photos.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try some Gouda? We have aged and young varieties.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 고다 치즈 드셔보시겠어요? 숙성과 생치즈 종류가 있어요.

choices.text: Yes please! What's the difference in taste?
Can I try the aged one? How old is it?
I don't eat cheese.
Cheese is overrated.

scenes.npcDialog: The tulips are in full bloom! Camera ready?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 튤립이 만개했어요! 카메라 준비하셨어요?

choices.text: This is so beautiful! Which area has the most colorful tulips?
Amazing! Can I buy tulip bulbs to take home?
Flowers are boring.
They're just flowers.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the Heineken Experience! The tour includes two beers at the end.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 하이네켄 체험관에 오신 것을 환영해요! 투어 끝에 맥주 2잔이 포함되어 있어요.

choices.text: Perfect! How long is the tour?
Great! Is there a brewing demonstration?
I don't drink beer.
Beer factories are boring.

scenes.npcDialog: This is the Red Light District. Photography of the windows is not allowed.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기는 레드라이트 지구예요. 창문 사진 촬영은 금지되어 있어요.

choices.text: I understand. Is it safe to walk around here?
What's the history of this area?
I want to take pictures anyway.
Rules don't apply to tourists.

scenes.npcDialog: This is a coffee shop, not a regular cafe. Do you know the difference?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기는 커피숍이에요, 일반 카페가 아니에요. 차이점 아세요?

choices.text: Oh, I heard about Dutch coffee shops. Can I just have a coffee?
I'm just looking around. Is it legal here?
I want everything.
Laws don't matter.

scenes.npcDialog: You can buy a ticket from the machine or tap your card on board.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 기계에서 표를 사거나 탑승 시 카드를 탭하면 돼요.

choices.text: Which tram goes to Museumplein?
Can I use the same ticket for multiple trams?
I'll ride without paying.
Trams are too slow.

scenes.npcDialog: The I amsterdam City Card includes free public transport and museum entries.
scenes.npcDialogKo: I amsterdam 시티 카드에는 무료 교통과 박물관 입장이 포함되어 있어요.

choices.text: That sounds great! How many days should I get?
Which museums are included?
That's too expensive.
I don't need a card.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for tulip bulbs? We ship worldwide!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 튤립 구근 찾으세요? 전 세계 배송 가능해요!

choices.text: Can I bring bulbs into Korea?
Which ones bloom in spring?
I don't care about flowers.
Flowers die anyway.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try some traditional Dutch food?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 네덜란드 전통 음식 드셔보시겠어요?

choices.text: Yes! What's a typical Dutch dish?
What's stamppot? Is it good?
I only eat Korean food.
Dutch food sounds boring.

scenes.npcDialog: Want to try raw herring the Dutch way? Hold it by the tail!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 네덜란드식으로 생청어 드셔보실래요? 꼬리를 잡고 먹어요!

choices.text: Sure! Is this how locals eat it?
I'll try it! Any tips for a first-timer?
Raw fish is disgusting.
That looks gross.

scenes.npcDialog: Fresh stroopwafel! Place it on your hot coffee to warm the syrup.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 갓 구운 스트롭와플이에요! 뜨거운 커피 위에 올려 시럽을 녹이세요.

choices.text: Delicious! Can I buy a box to take home?
Smells amazing! Are these made fresh?
Waffles are too sweet.
I don't eat sweets.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the diamond factory! Would you like to see how we cut diamonds?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 다이아몬드 공장에 오신 것을 환영해요! 다이아몬드 커팅 과정 보시겠어요?

choices.text: Yes! Why is Amsterdam famous for diamonds?
That sounds interesting! How long does cutting take?
Diamonds are overpriced.
This is just a sales pitch.

scenes.npcDialog: This is the Jordaan neighborhood. It's known for its cozy cafes and boutiques.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기는 요르단 지역이에요. 아늑한 카페와 부티크로 유명해요.

choices.text: It's so charming! Any local recommendations?
What's the best street to explore here?
Old neighborhoods are all the same.
I prefer modern areas.

scenes.npcDialog: This is Dam Square, the heart of Amsterdam. That's the Royal Palace.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기가 암스테르담의 중심인 담 광장이에요. 저기가 왕궁이에요.

choices.text: Can we go inside the palace?
What's the history of this square?
It's just a square.
I've seen better palaces.

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get you? We have local Dutch beers on tap.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 뭘 드릴까요? 현지 네덜란드 맥주가 생맥주로 있어요.

choices.text: What local beers do you recommend?
I'll try a small glass of your best Dutch beer.
I only drink imported beer.
Dutch beer is probably bad.
